title: Show Anon, GID, UID in v2 volumes
body:
Anon, GID, UID parameters previously hidden if empty in podman volume for API v2.

Status still hidden if empty, because it should not display a null string

Signed-off-by: Ashley Cui <acui@redhat.com>

Fixes https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/6524
